question.label: Decision lag
question.name: What decision are you waiting on that is slowing things down?
question.description: Finds dependency risk and whether progress is being held up by external calls.

assessment.note: Skip on a dependency-risk question gives no signal on clarity or engagement; [SESSION NON-FUNCTIONAL: 3+ consecutive non-answers. Queue cleared.]

new_queue.label: Reset timing
new_queue.name: Is now a good time for this, or should we pick it up later?
